values.name: query
values.value: SELECT c.id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, c.phone FROM customers c WHERE c.user_id = $1 OR (c.email = $2 AND $2 != '')

values.name: query
values.value: INSERT INTO chat_messages (message_id, conversation_id, user_id, customer_id, message_content, timestamp, platform, processed) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, false)
